notes: Authority sources in the manifest are real public sources reviewed on 2026-03-22 with explicit refresh cadence and decay policy.
Evaluation coverage includes normal guidance, legacy constraint handling, integration-adjacent failure modes, migration-risk prioritization, out-of-scope rejection, and low-confidence escalation.
Specialist-owned package content focuses on boundary, source policy, meta-agent contracts, fallback behavior, and specialty-specific examples instead of reproducing shared boilerplate corpora.
Local repository validation is recorded separately through npm run lint and npm test before PR creation.
